chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1983 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case: 1. For orders on Misc. No.9608/2020 (Urgency): 2. For order on office objections No.1,14 & 18: 3. For orders on Misc. No.9609/2020 (Exemption): 4. For orders on Misc. No.9610/2020 (Stay): 5. For hearing of main case: 20.03.2020: Mr. Mehmood-ul-Hasan, advocate for the petitioner. ----------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Learned counsel undertakes to comply with the office objections before the next date of hearing. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. At the outset, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the official respondents may be restrained from taking over possession of the subject Government accommodation viz. Bungalow No.6, GOR, Shireen Jinnah Colony, Clifton, Karachi, till his superannuation on 31.08.2020. It is further contended that he was affected by the Judgment dated 12.06.2013 passed by the Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan in Cr. Org. Petition No. 89/2011, whereby he was repatriated to report to his parent department and before that he was in possession of subject official accommodation. He further states that the competent authority has extended the retention period in respect of subject bungalow, therefore, prays for retention of subject premises till 31.08.2020. Subject to maintainability of the instant petition, issue notice to the respondents as well as to learned AAG with direction to file comments before the next date of hearing. To come up on 30.03.2020 along with C.P No.D-7120/2019.
